supply_chain.dependencies: Substantial reliance on AWS for cloud infrastructure hosting products and platforms. Dependence on VeriSign for .com and .net domain registry services. Reliance on ICANN accreditation for domain name registrar operations. Dependence on third-party payment processors for credit card transactions.
supply_chain.risks: AWS service interruptions could impact platform availability. VeriSign fee increases could raise costs. Loss of ICANN accreditation would prevent domain registration operations. Payment processor termination could disrupt revenue collection. Third-party vendor failures in data centers or services could cause service disruptions.

regulatory_risks: ICANN policy changes affecting domain name registration system
Changes to Registrar Accreditation Agreement (RAA) or Registry Agreement (RA)
EU General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) compliance requirements
California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA) and California Privacy Rights Act (CPRA) compliance
EU Network Information Security 2 Directive (NIS2) domain registration data verification requirements
EU Digital Services Act (DSA) content moderation and advertising restrictions
Payment card industry data security standards compliance
Bank Secrecy Act and state money transmitter licensing for payment services
U.S. Foreign Corrupt Practices Act (FCPA) and UK Bribery Act compliance
Export controls and economic sanctions regulations (OFAC)
Communications Decency Act (CDA) Section 230 potential amendments
Digital Millennium Copyright Act (DMCA) safe harbor requirements
Anti-Cybersquatting Consumer Protection Act (ACPA) liability
Telephone Consumer Protection Act (TCPA) compliance
Americans with Disabilities Act website accessibility requirements
Brazil Consumer Protection Code compliance
Artificial Intelligence regulations including EU AI Act
OECD global minimum tax rate implementation
State sales tax collection requirements post-Wayfair decision
FTC settlement agreement on security practices and advertising
Potential changes to internet neutrality regulations

sanction_risks: Russia sanctions following Ukraine invasion - shut down GoDaddy website in Russia and removed Ruble support
U.S., UK and EU financial and economic sanctions targeting Russia
Restrictions on business with U.S. embargoed or sanctioned countries, governments, persons and entities
Potential penalties for violations of export controls and sanctions laws
